verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my hiding place I run to You I need Your mercy and grace To see me through So I'll run to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are my strength Oh God You will uphold me You are my shield Oh God You will protect me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my hiding place I run to You I need Your mercy and grace To see me through So I'll run to You So I'll run to You I'll run to You
